'''Sunshine Lake''' was a body of [[Water/Legends|water]] on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon]] of [[Endor (planet)/Legends|Endor]]. [[Devil serpent/Legends|Devil serpents]] were known to occupy its waters. At the bottom of the [[lake]] was an [[Underwater Kingdom]] inhabited by a species of [[Unidentified finned amphibious species/Legends|underwater dwellers]].

{{Nature-stub}}
